name: Rhubarb-Apple Bread
recipeInstructions:
Preheat oven to 350 degrees Fahrenheit. Grease the bottoms only of two 9 x 5 x 3-inch loaf pans.
In a large bowl, mix together the rhubarb, apples, sugar, oil, vanilla extract and eggs.
Stir in the flour, baking soda, salt, cinnamon, cloves, baking powder and nuts.
Pour the batter into the prepared pans.
Bake for 50 to 60 minutes, or until a toothpick inserted in the center comes out clean.
Cool for 10 minutes. Loosen the sides of the loaves from the pans and remove them.
Cool completely before slicing. Wrap tightly and store at room temperature for up to 4 days,
or refrigerate for up to 10 days.
